privileged_info_summary: The task operates on patient BAH000002 (Amara Okonkwo, female, born 1985), a synthetic test record in the Bahmni EMR system. The agent must record a disposition of 'Admit Patient' with clinical notes containing the keywords: pneumonia, SpO2 88%, IV antibiotics, and oxygen. The required note text reads: 'Admit for acute pneumonia management. SpO2 88%, temperature 39.5C. Requires IV antibiotics and oxygen therapy.'
